column8: Darren had a new flat and he needed to buy a lot of new things. He had never had his own flat before, so he________his friend Mark to ask him what to do. (MEET)
column9: "Well, if I__________you, I would start with the colour of the walls", said Mark. "What colour would you like them to be?" (BE)
column10: Darren thought about it for a while. He realised he was no good at____________colours, so he asked Mark to help him. (CHOOSE)
column11: They____________to a paint shop and started looking at all the different colours. (GO)
column12: When he saw how much the paint cost, Darren was shocked. It was much__________than he had expected. (EXPENSIVE)
column13: "Let's get the_____________one they have. I don't care what colour it is!" said Darren. (CHEAP)
column14: Mark pointed to a very cheap paint that was a horrible brown colour. "I really_____________that's a good idea, Darren." (NOT THINK)
column15: Without saying anything, Darren picked up the tin of brown paint, took it into the counter, and__________it. (BUY)
column16: Mark couldn't believe it when Darren turned to__________and said: "I've learnt something today. Brown's my favourite colour!" (HE)
